shadow_phase3_findings.description: Record-section header (787-790) 'invariants are enforced at construction only' is false against HEAD: __setattr__/set_source_status re-validate source_status (and source) on every assignment — the diff self-contradicts (docstrings 20 lines below say the opposite). One-sentence rewrite; files as documented_falsehood.

eligibility_state is the un-guarded third taxonomy field on the same mutable dataclass (validated in __post_init__ only); a corrupted value propagates into owning_lifecycle_eligibility_state's producer path. Three-line __setattr__ extension.
result_presence (bool|None) is load-bearing in classification but lacks the bool-typing guard retrigger_evidence received; `is False` fails closed so no correctness bug — enforcement asymmetry only.
RelationshipGroup.members mutable list on frozen record + unenforced relationship<->cardinality invariant (tuple + __post_init__ check).
main()-level all-attempts-failed WARNING arm untested (3239-3251) — both firing and non-firing (dilution-fix) directions; a >= comparand revert stays green. Criticality 6.
_bound_strings serialization bounding has no direct test (3015-3022, applied at to_dict 3053); docs claim the bound; dropping the walk stays green. Criticality 6.
No main() e2e with a VALID --cloud-census (happy path through _validate_admitted_path -> read_cloud_census -> byte accounting -> census.cloud rows). Criticality 5.
TTL arithmetic and --ttl-seconds plumbing untested (expires_at == created_at + ttl; custom flag honored). Criticality 3.
see shadow-critic.json — sixth Python gh-caller (build-experiment-records.py) omitted from the DGH loop and the diff-added 'five Python gh-callers' enumerations (documented_falsehood + test_gap)
